creator: admin@lissyara.su
text:
Additional butons on mouse - works, but, pointer not move, mouse buttons
not works

======================
Nov  8 10:18:13 lissyara kernel: ukbd0: <vendor 0x046e USB Advance Mouse, class 0/0, rev 1.10/1.00, addr 2> on uhub1
Nov  8 10:18:13 lissyara kernel: kbd2 at ukbd0
Nov  8 10:18:13 lissyara kernel: ums1: <vendor 0x046e USB Advance Mouse, class 0/0, rev 1.10/1.00, addr 2> on uhub1
Nov  8 10:18:13 lissyara kernel: ums1: 3 buttons and Z dir.
========================

Fix: 

on linux it works correct...
